title: Eragear Code Copilot Settings
description: Configuration file for Eragear Code Copilot server (compiled executable mode)

boot.description: Boot-time configuration. In compiled mode, these values are used directly. In standard mode, environment variables take precedence.

mode.description: Runtime mode. 'compiled' uses settings.json only, ignoring env vars. 'standard' allows env var overrides.

WS_MAX_PAYLOAD_BYTES.description: Maximum WebSocket message payload size in bytes (default: 16MB)

WS_AUTH_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Timeout for unauthenticated WebSocket connections in milliseconds

WS_SESSION_REVALIDATE_INTERVAL_MS.description: Interval for periodic WebSocket session re-validation in milliseconds

HTTP_MAX_BODY_BYTES.description: Maximum HTTP request body size in bytes (default: 10MB)

AUTH_SECRET.description: Secret key for signing auth tokens. Must be at least 32 characters. REQUIRED in compiled mode. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

AUTH_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for auth callbacks (e.g., https://your-domain.com)

AUTH_DB_PATH.description: Path to the authentication SQLite database file

AUTH_TRUSTED_ORIGINS.description: List of trusted origins for CORS and Auth

AUTH_TRUSTED_PROXY_IPS.description: List of trusted reverse proxy IP addresses for X-Forwarded-For header trust

CORS_STRICT_ORIGIN.description: Enforce strict origin checking for CORS (must be true in production)

AUTH_ADMIN_USERNAME.description: Username for the bootstrap admin user

AUTH_ADMIN_EMAIL.description: Email for the bootstrap admin user

AUTH_ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Password for the bootstrap admin user. If not set, a random password is generated and stored in admin.credentials.json

AUTH_ALLOW_SIGNUP.description: Allow new user sign-ups after the first admin user is created

AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_API_KEY.description: Automatically create a bootstrap API key for the admin user

AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_ENSURE_DEFAULTS_TTL_MS.description: TTL for bootstrap defaults cache in milliseconds (default: 30 minutes)

AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_CACHE_MAX_USERS.description: Maximum cached users in bootstrap auth cache

AUTH_API_KEY_RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED.description: Enable rate limiting for auth resolution

AUTH_API_KEY_RATE_LIMIT_TIME_WINDOW_MS.description: Rate limit time window in milliseconds

AUTH_API_KEY_RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS.description: Maximum requests per rate limit window

AUTH_REQUIRE_CLOUDFLARE_ACCESS.description: Require Cloudflare Access authentication headers for WebSocket handshake

AUTH_CLOUDFLARE_ACCESS_CLIENT_ID.description: Cloudflare Access service token client ID

AUTH_CLOUDFLARE_ACCESS_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Cloudflare Access service token client secret

AUTH_CLOUDFLARE_ACCESS_JWT_PUBLIC_KEY_PE.description: Cloudflare Access JWT public key in PEM format for assertion verification

ALLOWED_AGENT_COMMAND_POLICIES.description: List of allowed agent commands with argument policies. REQUIRED in compiled mode.

allowAnyArgs.description: Allow any arguments to be passed

allowedArgs.description: List of allowed argument patterns (only if allowAnyArgs is false)

ALLOWED_TERMINAL_COMMAND_POLICIES.description: List of allowed terminal commands with argument policies. REQUIRED in compiled mode.

allowAnyArgs.description: Allow any arguments to be passed

allowedArgs.description: List of allowed argument patterns (only if allowAnyArgs is false)

ALLOWED_ENV_KEYS.description: List of environment variable names that can be passed to spawned processes. REQUIRED in compiled mode.

CONFIG_STRICT_ALLOWLIST.description: Enforce strict allowlist checking (reject commands not in allowlist)

ALLOW_INSECURE_DEV_DEFAULTS.description: Allow insecure development defaults (NEVER set true in production)

ACP_ENABLE_FS_WRITE.description: Allow agents to write to the filesystem. Keep disabled unless you explicitly trust the agent.

ACP_ENABLE_TERMINAL.description: Allow agents to execute terminal commands. Keep disabled unless you explicitly trust the agent.

SESSION_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Idle timeout before cleaning up runtime session state in milliseconds (default: 10 minutes)

SESSION_BUFFER_LIMIT.description: Maximum number of buffered messages per session

SESSION_UI_MESSAGE_LIMIT.description: Maximum UI messages to retain per session

SESSION_LIST_PAGE_MAX_LIMIT.description: Maximum page size for session list endpoints

SESSION_MESSAGES_PAGE_MAX_LIMIT.description: Maximum page size for session message endpoints

SESSION_LOCK_ACQUIRE_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Timeout for acquiring session lock in milliseconds

SESSION_EVENT_BUS_PUBLISH_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Timeout for publishing to session event bus

SESSION_EVENT_BUS_PUBLISH_MAX_QUEUE_PER_.description: Maximum queued event bus publish jobs per chat

PROMPT_NO_SUBSCRIBER_ABORT_GRACE_MS.description: Grace period before aborting prompt with no subscribers

MAX_TOKENS.description: Default max tokens for AI prompts

MESSAGE_CONTENT_MAX_BYTES.description: Maximum message content size in bytes (default: 2MB)

MESSAGE_PARTS_MAX_BYTES.description: Maximum message parts size in bytes (default: 4MB)

AGENT_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Maximum agent runtime duration in milliseconds (0 or omit = no limit)

TERMINAL_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Maximum terminal command runtime in milliseconds (0 or omit = no limit)

TERMINAL_OUTPUT_HARD_CAP_BYTES.description: Hard cap for retained terminal output bytes (default: 1MB)

ACP_REQUEST_MAX_ATTEMPTS.description: Maximum retry attempts for ACP requests

ACP_REQUEST_RETRY_BASE_DELAY_MS.description: Base delay for ACP request retry backoff

ACP_PERMISSION_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Timeout for user permission requests in milliseconds (default: 5 minutes)

ACP_NDJSON_MAX_LINE_BYTES.description: Maximum NDJSON line size in bytes (default: 1MB)

ACP_STDERR_MAX_TOTAL_BYTES.description: Maximum total stderr bytes to retain from ACP processes

ACP_TURN_ID_POLICY.description: ACP turn ID policy: 'compat' for backwards compatibility, 'require-native' for strict native turn IDs

LOG_FLUSH_INTERVAL_MS.description: Log buffer flush interval in milliseconds

LOG_RETENTION_DAYS.description: Number of days to retain log files

BACKGROUND_TICK_MS.description: Background runner tick interval in milliseconds

BACKGROUND_SESSION_CLEANUP_INTERVAL_MS.description: Interval for session cleanup background task

BACKGROUND_CACHE_PRUNE_INTERVAL_MS.description: Interval for cache prune background task

BACKGROUND_STORAGE_MAINTENANCE_INTERVAL_.description: Interval for storage maintenance background task

STORAGE_WORKER_ENABLED.description: Enable SQLite worker thread for async writes (recommended for high concurrency)

STORAGE_BUSY_MAX_RETRIES.description: Maximum retries for SQLite busy errors

STORAGE_BUSY_RETRY_BASE_DELAY_MS.description: Base delay for SQLite retry backoff

SQLITE_WRITE_QUEUE_MAX_PENDING.description: Maximum pending writes in SQLite queue

STORAGE_MAX_BIND_PARAMS.description: Maximum bind parameters per SQLite query

STORAGE_INCREMENTAL_VACUUM_MIN_FREE_PAGE.description: Minimum free pages to trigger incremental vacuum

STORAGE_INCREMENTAL_VACUUM_STEP_PAGES.description: Pages to vacuum per incremental step

STORAGE_WAL_CHECKPOINT_INTERVAL_MS.description: Interval for WAL checkpoint in milliseconds

STORAGE_RETENTION_HOT_DAYS.description: Days to retain hot (recent) data before compaction

STORAGE_ALLOW_UNKNOWN_FS.description: Allow storage on unknown filesystem types

RUNTIME_NODE_ROLE.description: Runtime node role for distributed deployments

RUNTIME_WRITER_URL.description: URL of the writer node (required for reader role)

RUNTIME_INTERNAL_TOKEN.description: Internal token for runtime node communication
